headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Valuation Check After Energy Sector Rally And Strong Investor Optimism
summary: Why Marathon Petroleum stock is back in focus Marathon Petroleum (MPC) has drawn fresh attention after its share price climbed more than 5% on March 2, as West Texas Intermediate crude oil rose over 6% to an 8.25 month high. See our latest analysis for Marathon Petroleum. That move fits into a stronger run for the stock, with a 30 day share price return of 24.79% and a year to date share price return of 33.69%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 66.89% points to building momentum backed...
